rationale: Educ. Code §38.059 governs school district cooperation with public health agencies for school-based health centers. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A school district may seek assistance in establishing and operating a school-based health center from any public health agency in the community.
_note: Rule text concerns school-based health centers; proposed change concerns homestead exemption amount. No overlap.
